Two desktop polish changes for the KasmVNC web UI.

## Fixed
- **Confirmation dialogs no longer open maximized.** The openbox rule that maximizes Krusader's main window also matched its dialogs — copy/move/overwrite confirmations and KIO prompts share the same `WM_CLASS=krusader` — so they opened full-screen and re-maximized on every open, ignoring any manual resize. The rule is now scoped to the top-level window (`type="normal"`); dialogs keep their natural, remembered size. (Regression introduced in v1.1.0.)

## Changed
- **Accent colour is now white instead of blue.** The Breeze Dark focus frame around the active panel, the hover lines and the accent highlights changed from blue (`#3daee9`) to white. The file-selection highlight is now a white bar with dark text so selected entries stay readable.
